name: NIKA PHARMACEUTICALS, INC
business: Nika Pharmaceuticals, Inc. has exclusive rights to produce and distribute Thymus Nuclear Glycoprotein (TNG) for treating HIV, and dietary supplements Carotilen and Physiolong. It also has a joint business agreement to develop medicinal products based on the Inactivated Pepsin Fraction (IPF) platform. The company is building a pharmaceutical factory for production of drugs in various forms.

exposures.sentence: On April 7, 2022, the Company signed with VITAL FE Joint Stock Company an Exclusive Rights Agreement for a term of 15 years for the production and distribution of Thymus Nuclear Glycoprotein (TNG).
On April 7, 2022, signed with MICAR 11 LTD. an Exclusive Rights Agreement for a term of 15 years for the production and distribution of two dietary supplements, namely Carotilen and Physiolong.

On August 1, 2022, the Company signed a Joint Business Agreement with Immunotech Laboratories BG, Ltd. through which the two companies are combining their efforts to realize the registration, production and distribution of medicinal products based on the Inactivated Pepsin Fraction (IPF) platform with U.S. Patents N 7,479,538, 7,625,565, 8,066,982, 8,067,531, 8,309,072.
